failure.symptom: webpack-dev-server启动失败，Cannot find module 'webpack-cli/bin/config-yargs'。安装webpack-cli@3后仍无法启动，Node 16/18均失败
attempted: npm install --legacy-peer-deps + Node 16 → 同样webpack-cli missing
npm install webpack-cli@3 → 安装成功但dev server仍无输出(exit 7)
failure.recommendation: 跳过，老版webpack项目依赖不兼容当前环境
